message:
WMI-3 attacker content into authoritative position (attacker-pointer-into-field): content is installed into struct field 'vgem_buf_entry.file' — the position the confused consumer later follows as a trusted reference. [mechanism:attacker-pointer-into-field;indicates=WMI-3] [mem:struct=vgem_buf_entry;field=file;offset=8] [oracle:assert=file holds trusted, not attacker-determined, content;assume=externally-originated content installed into the field]
WMI-3 attacker content into authoritative position (allocated-content-into-field): content is installed into struct field 'vgem_buf_entry.file' — the position the confused consumer later follows as a trusted reference. [mechanism:allocated-content-into-field;indicates=WMI-3] [mem:struct=vgem_buf_entry;field=file;offset=8] [oracle:assert=file holds trusted, not attacker-determined, content;assume=externally-originated content installed into the field]
